data.name: Firebrand Archer

"The best way to learn from a book on pyromancy is to burn it."
—Jaya Ballard

Flying
Whenever you cast a noncreature or Dragon spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

Whenever equipped creature becomes untapped, remove a bait counter from this Equipment. If you do, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token.

Flying, haste

Ferocious — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, you may pay {R}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Flashfreeze
data.oracle_text: Counter target red or green spell.
data.flavor_text:
"Your downfall was not your ignorance, your weakness, or your hubris, but your warm blood."
—Heidar, Rimewind master

data.name: Fleeting Distraction
data.oracle_text:
Target creature gets -1/-0 until end of turn.
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: The first spell taught to young mages, it has spared the lives of many whose hands are too small to hold a sword.

data.name: Fleeting Flight
data.oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains flying until end of turn. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to it this turn.
data.flavor_text: On that fateful day, Sir Brilbury's fear of heights was outmatched by his sense of duty.

data.name: Fog Bank
data.oracle_text:
Defender (This creature can't attack.)
Flying
Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to and dealt by this creature.
data.flavor_text: The battalion thought they could escape the fog by marching in a straight line. Three days later, they began to suspect it was following them.

data.name: Frenzied Goblin
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {R}. If you do, target creature can't block this turn.
data.flavor_text: The upside to not thinking about the consequences is that you'll always surprise those who do.

data.name: Fumigate
data.oracle_text: Destroy all creatures. You gain 1 life for each creature destroyed this way.
data.flavor_text:
"Ghirapur's gremlin population poses a threat to the infrastructure of the fairgrounds. Threats must be eliminated."
—Sram, senior edificer

data.name: Fynn, the Fangbearer
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Whenever a creature you control with deathtouch deals combat damage to a player, that player gets two poison counters. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)
data.flavor_text: "Come, Koma, and reclaim what you lost! Or does the great serpent fear a rematch?"

data.name: Garna, Bloodfist of Keld
data.oracle_text: Whenever another creature you control dies, draw a card if it was attacking. Otherwise, Garna deals 1 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text: Keldons live for the fervor of battle, as eager to receive scars as they are to give them.

data.name: Garruk's Uprising
data.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, draw a card.
Creatures you control have trample. (Each of those creatures can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Whenever a creature you control with power 4 or greater enters, draw a card.

data.name: Gate Colossus
data.oracle_text:
Affinity for Gates (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Gate you control.)
This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.
Whenever a Gate you control enters, you may put this card from your graveyard on top of your library.

Kicker {B} (You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, target player sacrifices a creature of their choice.

data.oracle_text:
Whenever a Gate you control enters, this creature can't be blocked this turn.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "I've been through every guildgate in this city, and no one sees me come or go."

data.name: Genesis Wave
data.oracle_text: Reveal the top X cards of your library. You may put any number of permanent cards with mana value X or less from among them onto the battlefield. Then put all cards revealed this way that weren't put onto the battlefield into your graveyard.

This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the total power of creatures you control.
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
data.flavor_text: The earth walks, strongest of all.

data.flavor_text: Tolarians teach the theory of pyromancy. The Ghitu prefer applied research.

Flying, vigilance
Each other Angel you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it for each Angel you already control.
{T}: Add {W}. Spend this mana only to cast an Angel spell.

Defender

data.name: Highborn Vampire
data.flavor_text: With the bloodchiefs annihilated in the fight between the free and enthralled, the swamps around Malakir are full of dangerous, young vampires eager to make their marks.

Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)

Enchant creature, land, or planeswalker

Incinerating Blast deals 6 damage to target creature.

data.name: Infernal Vessel
data.oracle_text: When this creature dies, if it wasn't a Demon, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with two +1/+1 counters on it. It's a Demon in addition to its other types.
data.flavor_text: "Rise, my liege! Rise, and blanket the world in eternal night!"

data.name: Infestation Sage
data.oracle_text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token with flying.
data.flavor_text: "I control the swarm. If you strike me down, there will be nothing left to hold back their hunger."

data.name: Ingenious Leonin
data.oracle_text: {3}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on another target attacking creature you control. If that creature is a Cat, it gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
data.flavor_text: Leonin claws were already deadly weapons of natural evolution before he improved upon them.

data.name: Inspiration from Beyond
data.oracle_text:
Mill three cards, then return an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.
Flashback {5}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text: When seeking spiritual enlightenment, best to go directly to the source.

data.oracle_text: Draw a card for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. Those creatures gain indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them.)
data.flavor_text: "They said we were weak, did they? Let's show them what happens when we fight as one!"

data.name: Inspiring Overseer

Flying
When this creature enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
